title: Run release verification and finalize the Kioku ship gate
acceptance_criteria: The release checklist explicitly confirms Kioku is retrieval-only and RelayHQ stays canonical.
The Kioku workstream has a clear ship/no-ship gate based on the regression suite.
Release verification documents the residual risks and any follow-up work.
No unchecked placeholder or mock Kioku path remains in the release plan.
completion_summary: Validated the completed Kioku boundary against focused suites, the full app test suite, and a production Nuxt build, then closed the workstream.
